videoJson.name: Digital Betacam
videoJson.size:
Small: 15.6 cm × 9.6 cm × 2.5 cm
Large: 25.4 cm × 14.5 cm × 2.5 cm
videoJson.fact1: This format was in competition with the D1 format, but was significantly cheaper
videoJson.fact2: Digital Betacam decks included SDI coaxial digital connections, which allowed digital signals to be sent on existing coaxial wiring
videoJson.fact3: This format's cassettes are usually light blue, to distinguish them from other cassettes of the same size
